page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-180-lssd is a memory-optimized server instance powered by the x86_64 AMD EPYC 9B14 processor. It features 180 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 90 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, alongside 1440 GB of RAM, yielding an 8.0 GB memory-to-core ratio. The hardware configuration includes 16 local NVMe SSDs providing 6432 GB of high-speed local storage.

In benchmark evaluations, this instance demonstrates top-tier performance across multi-core processing and memory subsystem tests. It achieves top 10% placement in stress-ng multi-core CPU performance, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU scores. Its memory architecture delivers top-tier read and write bandwidth, which translates to exceptional throughput in memory-bound operations. The processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512, AVX512_VNNI, and AVX512_BF16, which accelerate cryptographic and vector-based calculations.

The inclusion of 16 local NVMe SSDs makes this server highly cost-efficient for workloads requiring high-density, low-latency storage without the overhead of network-attached storage. Benchmark results highlight its strength in database operations and Redis SET operations, where it achieves top-tier throughput. Additionally, the platform exhibits strong performance in CPU-based LLM inference, particularly in prompt processing and text generation for medium and large models.

This server is designed for large-scale enterprise databases, in-memory caching layers like Redis, heavy software compilation, and data-intensive analytical pipelines. The combination of massive memory capacity, high-core compute density, and local NVMe storage ensures optimal execution of parallel processing tasks and low-latency data retrieval.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-180-lssd is a memory-optimized server instance featuring 180 dedicated vCPUs on an AMD EPYC 9B14 x86_64 processor, 1440 GB of RAM, and 6432 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Designed for high-density workloads, it delivers top-tier performance in multi-core processing, memory bandwidth, and Redis operations. The CPU supports AVX-512 and AVX512_BF16 instructions, enhancing vector and cryptographic calculations. With its balanced combination of massive memory, high-speed local storage, and exceptional multi-threaded compute capabilities, this instance is highly cost-efficient for data-intensive applications. It is optimized for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, software compilation, and CPU-based LLM inference.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized server with dedicated AMD EPYC processors and integrated local NVMe storage for demanding database workloads.

6432 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance
